# Email addresses intentionally present in this repository.
#
# Every email matched by the PII-scan regex must appear here or the
# LGPD/GDPR conformance workflows will fail the build. Keep the list
# short — if it grows beyond ~20 lines, something has likely gone wrong
# (a real PII leak, or the regex needs tightening).
#
# Two formats are accepted (one entry per line):
#   - Full address:        bruno.guitarpro@gmail.com
#   - Domain wildcard:     @example.com   (matches any *@example.com)
#
# Blank lines and `#` comments are ignored. Comparison is case-insensitive.

# Maintainer — appears in commit trailers and may be referenced in docs.
bruno.guitarpro@gmail.com

# Anthropic Claude Code co-author trailer used in commit messages.
noreply@anthropic.com

# Well-known SSH URL for GitHub remotes (not a deliverable mailbox).
git@github.com

# RFC 6761 reserved test/example domains — used freely in unit tests
# and snapshot fixtures. Wildcarded so individual fixture addresses
# (`user1@example.com`, `helper@example.com`, etc.) don't need
# per-address entries.
@example.com
@test.com

# One-off test-fixture address on a real domain. Consider migrating
# the fixture to an `@example.com` address and removing this line.
same@email.com
